description: Use this API to change the status of the multi-terminal dc line model at a specified multi- terminal dc line. This API routine was first introduced in release 30.2.0. ierr = mtdclmod_status(dc, status)

parameters.name: dc
parameters.description: Quoted name of the multi-terminal dc line for which the model status is to be changed; if an unquoted integer value is specified, the api converts it to a left- justified name. (input; no default allowed).

error_codes.description: no model at this dc line.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
